title: Support nested interface arrays as port connections

features.name: nested interface with array member
features.description: Code should include an interface definition containing an array of another interface as a member (arrayed nested interface)

features.name: interface array element as module port via dot notation
features.description: Code should include passing an array element of a nested interface (accessed via dot notation) as a module port connection

features.name: parameterized interface containing interface array
features.description: Code should include a parameterized interface that contains an array of a parameterized nested interface, with parameter passthrough
